requirement_topic.en: EMC — Bare Induction Motor (no integrated electronics)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——纯感应电机（无集成电子装置）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——純感應電機（無集成電子裝置）

summary.en: Argentina does not impose a specific mandatory horizontal EMC certification scheme equivalent to the EU EMC Directive for bare induction motors. IRAM handles product certification for listed categories via adoption of relevant IEC standards. INTI can assess EMC-related performance. There is no horizontal RoHS mandate for motors in Argentina; INTI handles substance requirements on a piecemeal basis. For bare passive induction motors without integrated electronics, no dedicated mandatory EMC pre-market approval exists under the current IRAM scheme, though general safety and quality requirements under the applicable IRAM standard apply. Exporters should verify whether any Secretaría de Industria or other Argentine authority has issued specific EMC resolutions applicable to the motor category.
summary.zh: 阿根廷没有针对纯感应电机的、等同于欧盟EMC指令的专项强制横向EMC认证方案。IRAM通过采用相关IEC标准处理列名类别的产品认证。INTI可评定与EMC相关的性能。阿根廷对电机没有横向RoHS规定；INTI按具体情况处理物质要求。对于无集成电子装置的纯被动感应电机，在当前IRAM方案下不存在专项强制EMC上市前批准，但适用IRAM标准下的一般安全和质量要求仍适用。出口商应核实工业秘书处或其他阿根廷主管机构是否发布了适用于该电机类别的具体EMC决议。
summary.zht: 阿根廷沒有針對純感應電機的、等同於歐盟EMC指令的專項強制橫向EMC認證方案。IRAM通過採用相關IEC標準處理列名類別的產品認證。INTI可評定與EMC相關的性能。阿根廷對電機沒有橫向RoHS規定；INTI按具體情況處理物質要求。對於無集成電子裝置的純被動感應電機，在當前IRAM方案下不存在專項強制EMC上市前批准，但適用IRAM標準下的一般安全和質量要求仍適用。出口商應核實工業秘書處或其他阿根廷主管機構是否發布了適用於該電機類別的具體EMC決議。

standards_or_laws: INTI — conformity assessment and substance requirements
No horizontal RoHS mandate for motors in Argentina (verified: false)

summary.en: China does not impose a dedicated mandatory EMC standard specifically on bare induction motors. GB/T 10069 series (recommended, not mandatory) covers EMC-related characteristics for rotating machines. CCC certification is not required for most general industrial three-phase AC motors. No horizontal RoHS-equivalent mandate for motors exists in China; substance requirements are addressed separately under GB/T standards where applicable.
summary.zh: 中国没有专门针对纯感应电机的强制性EMC标准。GB/T 10069系列（推荐性，非强制性）涵盖旋转机械的EMC相关特性。大多数一般工业三相交流电机不要求CCC认证。中国对电机没有横向RoHS等效强制规定；物质要求在适用时通过GB/T标准单独处理。
summary.zht: 中國沒有專門針對純感應電機的強制性EMC標準。GB/T 10069系列（推薦性，非強制性）涵蓋旋轉機械的EMC相關特性。大多數一般工業三相交流電機不要求CCC認證。中國對電機沒有橫向RoHS等效強制規定；物質要求在適用時通過GB/T標準單獨處理。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 10069 series (EMC for rotating machines — recommended, not mandatory)
No mandatory CCC EMC requirement for most general industrial motors

gap.en: Neither Argentina nor China imposes a mandatory dedicated EMC pre-market approval scheme on bare induction motors, creating a relatively narrow gap for this specific product configuration. The main compliance obligations for Argentina remain IRAM certification, INTI testing for efficiency and safety, and Secretaría de Energía energy efficiency labelling. Exporters should still confirm there are no specific Argentine resolutions imposing EMC requirements on the applicable motor category, as Argentine regulations can be issued by resolution outside the main IRAM framework.
gap.zh: 阿根廷和中国均未对纯感应电机实施强制专项EMC上市前批准方案，该特定产品配置的差距相对较小。阿根廷的主要合规义务仍为IRAM认证、INTI效率和安全检测，以及能源秘书处能效标识。出口商仍应确认阿根廷是否发布了对适用电机类别施加EMC要求的具体决议，因为阿根廷法规可通过IRAM主框架之外的决议发布。
gap.zht: 阿根廷和中國均未對純感應電機實施強制專項EMC上市前批准方案，該特定產品配置的差距相對較小。阿根廷的主要合規義務仍為IRAM認證、INTI效率和安全檢測，以及能源秘書處能效標識。出口商仍應確認阿根廷是否發布了對適用電機類別施加EMC要求的具體決議，因為阿根廷法規可通過IRAM主框架之外的決議發布。

mandatory_status.target: No dedicated mandatory EMC pre-market approval for bare induction motors under current IRAM scheme — verify for any applicable Argentine resolution; general IRAM safety and quality requirements apply
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory EMC standard for bare industrial motors; GB/T 10069 is recommended only

source.publisher: IRAM — Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For bare induction motors exported to Argentina, no dedicated mandatory EMC pre-market certification scheme equivalent to the EU EMC Directive currently appears to apply under the main IRAM framework. However, exporters must verify that no Argentine resolution has introduced specific EMC requirements for the applicable motor category, and must still comply with IRAM certification, INTI testing, and Secretaría de Energía labelling obligations. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于出口至阿根廷的纯感应电机，主要IRAM框架下目前似乎没有适用的等同于欧盟EMC指令的专项强制EMC上市前认证方案。但出口商须核实阿根廷是否发布了针对适用电机类别的具体EMC要求决议，并仍须遵守IRAM认证、INTI检测和能源秘书处标识义务。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於出口至阿根廷的純感應電機，主要IRAM框架下目前似乎沒有適用的等同於歐盟EMC指令的專項強制EMC上市前認證方案。但出口商須核實阿根廷是否發布了針對適用電機類別的具體EMC要求決議，並仍須遵守IRAM認證、INTI檢測和能源秘書處標識義務。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。

requirement_topic.en: EMC and Substance Requirements — Motor with Integrated VFD or Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容及物质要求——集成变频器或电子装置的电机
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容及物質要求——集成變頻器或電子裝置的電機

summary.en: When an industrial motor is sold combined with a variable-frequency drive (VFD), inverter, or integrated power electronics, additional Argentine regulatory requirements may apply beyond basic IRAM motor certification. INTI handles conformity assessment for electronic equipment and may apply IEC-aligned EMC test protocols. There is no horizontal RoHS mandate in Argentina equivalent to the EU RoHS Directive; INTI addresses hazardous substance requirements on a product-specific or piecemeal basis. Exporters of motor-drive integrated systems should verify with INTI and IRAM whether the combined system requires separate certification beyond the bare motor IRAM scheme.
summary.zh: 当工业电机与变频器（VFD）、逆变器或集成电力电子装置组合销售时，除基本IRAM电机认证外，可能适用额外的阿根廷监管要求。INTI负责电子设备的合格评定，可能采用与IEC对齐的EMC测试规程。阿根廷没有等同于欧盟RoHS指令的横向RoHS规定；INTI按产品或具体情况处理有害物质要求。电机驱动集成系统的出口商应向INTI和IRAM确认组合系统是否需要超出纯电机IRAM方案的单独认证。
summary.zht: 當工業電機與變頻器（VFD）、逆變器或集成電力電子裝置組合銷售時，除基本IRAM電機認證外，可能適用額外的阿根廷監管要求。INTI負責電子設備的合格評定，可能採用與IEC對齊的EMC測試規程。阿根廷沒有等同於歐盟RoHS指令的橫向RoHS規定；INTI按產品或具體情況處理有害物質要求。電機驅動集成系統的出口商應向INTI和IRAM確認組合系統是否需要超出純電機IRAM方案的單獨認證。

standards_or_laws: INTI — conformity assessment for electronic equipment (IEC-aligned protocols)
IRAM certification scheme (applicable to combined systems — verify scope)
No horizontal RoHS mandate in Argentina for motors or drives (verified: false — confirm current status)

summary.en: In China, GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equivalent to IEC 61800-3:2004) covers EMC requirements for variable-speed power drive systems on a recommended basis. CCC certification is not mandatory for most industrial drive products. China does not have a horizontal RoHS mandate for industrial motors or drives equivalent to the EU RoHS Directive; hazardous substance requirements for electronic products are addressed under GB/T 26572 and related standards on a voluntary basis for most industrial equipment.
summary.zh: 在中国，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）以推荐性标准规范变速电力传动系统的EMC要求。大多数工业驱动产品不要求CCC认证。中国没有针对工业电机或驱动器的、等同于欧盟RoHS指令的横向RoHS规定；电子产品有害物质要求对大多数工业设备以自愿方式通过GB/T 26572及相关标准处理。
summary.zht: 在中國，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）以推薦性標準規範變速電力傳動系統的EMC要求。大多數工業驅動產品不要求CCC認證。中國沒有針對工業電機或驅動器的、等同於歐盟RoHS指令的橫向RoHS規定；電子產品有害物質要求對大多數工業設備以自願方式通過GB/T 26572及相關標準處理。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equiv. IEC 61800-3:2004 — recommended, not mandatory for most industrial drives)
GB/T 26572 (hazardous substance restrictions for electronic products — voluntary for most industrial equipment)

gap.en: For motor-VFD integrated systems, the gap between Argentina and China is moderate: neither jurisdiction imposes a mandatory horizontal EMC or RoHS scheme on most industrial motor-drive combinations, unlike the EU. However, INTI may require conformity assessment for the electronic components of an integrated system, and IRAM scope for the combined product should be verified. Exporters of motor-drive integrated systems should proactively engage INTI and IRAM to confirm whether additional certification beyond the bare motor IRAM scheme applies.
gap.zh: 对于电机-变频器集成系统，阿根廷与中国之间的差距适中：与欧盟不同，两个司法管辖区对大多数工业电机驱动器组合均不实施强制横向EMC或RoHS方案。但INTI可能对集成系统的电子组件要求合规评定，且应核实IRAM对组合产品的适用范围。电机驱动集成系统出口商应主动联系INTI和IRAM，确认是否需要超出纯电机IRAM方案的额外认证。
gap.zht: 對於電機-變頻器集成系統，阿根廷與中國之間的差距適中：與歐盟不同，兩個司法管轄區對大多數工業電機驅動器組合均不實施強制橫向EMC或RoHS方案。但INTI可能對集成系統的電子組件要求合規評定，且應核實IRAM對組合產品的適用範圍。電機驅動集成系統出口商應主動聯繫INTI和IRAM，確認是否需要超出純電機IRAM方案的額外認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory IRAM certification for motor; additional INTI conformity assessment may apply to electronic components of integrated systems — verify scope with IRAM and INTI; no horizontal RoHS mandate
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) only for EMC in drive systems; no horizontal RoHS mandate for most industrial motor-drive equipment

source.publisher: INTI — Instituto Nacional de Tecnología Industrial

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For motor-drive integrated systems exported to Argentina, exporters should verify with INTI and IRAM whether the combined system requires certification beyond the bare motor IRAM scheme. No horizontal RoHS mandate currently appears to apply in Argentina for industrial motor-drive equipment, but this should be confirmed. Neither Argentina nor China has a mandatory EMC pre-market scheme equivalent to the EU EMC Directive for most industrial drive configurations. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于出口至阿根廷的电机驱动集成系统，出口商应向INTI和IRAM核实组合系统是否需要超出纯电机IRAM方案的认证。目前阿根廷似乎没有针对工业电机驱动设备的横向RoHS规定，但应予以确认。阿根廷和中国对大多数工业驱动器配置均没有等同于欧盟EMC指令的强制EMC上市前方案。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於出口至阿根廷的電機驅動集成系統，出口商應向INTI和IRAM核實組合系統是否需要超出純電機IRAM方案的認證。目前阿根廷似乎沒有針對工業電機驅動設備的橫向RoHS規定，但應予以確認。阿根廷和中國對大多數工業驅動器配置均沒有等同於歐盟EMC指令的強制EMC上市前方案。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。
